description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with two stages: build and publish. In the build stage add a build_page job that uses the image registry.gitlab.com/gbraad/sitegen:latest, runs the script steps: git clone https://gitlab.com/gbraad/blog-content.git content --depth 1; mkdir -p themes; git clone https://gitlab.com/gbraad/blog-theme.git themes/gbraad --depth 1; pelican‑themes --symlink `pwd`/themes/gbraad; git clone https://github.com/getpelican/pelican-plugins plugins --depth 1 --recursive; pip install disqus-python; make publish; mv output public. The job stores the public directory as an artifact. In the same pipeline add a pages job that runs in the publish stage, uses the image registry.gitlab.com/gbraad/docker:git, runs only on the master branch, and publishes the public directory as a GitLab Pages artifact. Also add a publish job in the publish stage using the same docker image, which changes into the public directory, initializes a git repository, adds a remote named github using the secret $GITHUB_TOKEN, adds all files, configures user.email "me@gbraad.nl" and user.name "Gerard Braad", commits with message 'Deployed by GitLab: https://gitlab.com/gbraad/blog', renames the branch to gh-pages, and pushes to the GitHub repository, forcing deletion of the remote gh-pages branch if needed.
